raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. ระแนงบังแดดเหล็ก ดูแบบขยาย (A-16). บัวปูนปั้น กว้าง 0.10 ม ลึก 0.10 ม (called out twice). เซาะร่อง หรือฝังเส้น PVC (called out twice). Grid callouts along the bottom, right to left: 4, 3, 2, 1 (mirrored/reversed reading direction from elevation 1), dimension chain 1.30 | 3.20 | 3.20 | 3.20 (=9.60) | 1.30, bracketed 0.30+1.00=1.30 on each end.
description: Elevation 3 (รูปด้าน 3) — the opposite long facade from รูปด้าน 1, viewed from outside gridA (south side), spanning grid4 down to grid1 (numbered right-to-left in this view). Flat parapet-topped facade with plaster cornice and steel sunshade lattice above a central window group (hexagon '1' x2 flanking a garage-style opening tagged '2' with a small circle), openings at regular window spacing across the 9.60m span. Level datum: ±0.00 to +0.60 to +3.75, same as other elevations.
warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): dimension chain 1.30(=0.30+1.00)|3.20|3.20|3.20|1.30(=1.00+0.30) totals 12.20m across grid1-4 (9.60m) plus 1.30m overhang each end — the 1.30m figure (vs. 1.00m read on elevation 1/2 for the same grid1/grid4 overhangs) suggests this elevation's overhang dimension includes an additional 0.30m sub-component (fascia/eave board thickness or a wall-face offset) not separately called out on the floor plan. Flagged as a minor cross-sheet discrepancy for human review rather than reconciled — both readings (1.00m on หน้า06/08, 1.30m here) are independently legible printed values, not misreads.
This page (A-07) contains two elevations; the second (รูปด้าน 4) is in sibling file _หน้า09_elevation4.json.
Grid numbers are printed right-to-left (4,3,2,1) on this sheet since it is the opposite-facing elevation — consistent with standard 4-way elevation convention, not a labeling error.
